## cmd v1.0.0

First public release.

### Highlights
- Terminal command navigator for macOS
- fzf browser with Essential / Recent / Useful / System tiers
- 32 curated command cards with examples
- UI languages: English, Russian, Chinese (`cmd lang`)
- zsh hotkeys: **Ctrl+O**, **F2**
- Multilingual README: [EN](../README.md) · [RU](../README.ru.md) · [ZH](../README.zh-CN.md)

### Requirements
- macOS 13+
- Python 3.9+
- zsh 5.8+
- fzf 0.30+

### Install
```bash
brew install fzf
git clone https://github.com/godshiba/cmd.git ~/scripts/cmd
cd ~/scripts/cmd && ./cmd index
```
